sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n102434" key="taraxopoio/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τᾰρᾰχοποιός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n102434.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">causing disorder</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">confusion</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0096.tlg002:76b" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aesop.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">76b</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
